description: Scaffold packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts/ directory and index.ts barrel
Add @alga-psa/ui/keyboard-shortcuts and /keyboard-shortcuts/* exports to packages/ui/package.json
types.ts: ShortcutAction, ShortcutScope union, BindingDescriptor, ParsedToken (code|char), Platform, PersistedShortcuts shape
platform.ts: client-only platform detection (mac vs other) resolved post-mount, never during SSR

Define ShortcutStorage adapter interface (read/write/subscribe over the persisted keyboard_shortcuts_v1 shape) in packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts/storage.ts; all engine persistence code depends only on this interface

Provide a default in-memory/no-op ShortcutStorage so packages/ui/keyboard-shortcuts works standalone with ZERO @alga-psa/user-composition or feature-package (tickets/billing/assets/projects/...) imports

Dependency-boundary guard: a CI-runnable check that fails if any file under packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts imports @alga-psa/user-composition or any feature package, or if `npx nx graph` introduces a cycle absent from .github/known-cycles.json (aligns with .github/workflows/circular-deps.yml and eslint-plugin-custom-rules)
parseBinding(str): parse modifier set + single key token
parseBinding: classify token as code-kind for letters a-z (→ KeyA..KeyZ)
parseBinding: classify digits (→ Digit0..9) and function keys (F1..F12) as code-kind
parseBinding: classify named keys (Enter, Escape, Tab, Space, ArrowUp/Down/Left/Right, Delete, Backspace, Home, End, PageUp/Down) as code-kind
parseBinding: classify bracket tokens [ ] as code-kind (BracketLeft/BracketRight)
parseBinding: classify glyph tokens (e.g. ?) as char-kind matched on produced character
parseBinding: support `mod` token plus literal `ctrl`/`meta`/`shift`/`alt` modifiers; literal ctrl/meta not remapped across OS
parseBinding: deterministic modifier normalization order and lowercase printable normalization
parseBinding: reject invalid/unsupported syntax with a typed error result
parseSequence(str): parse space-separated chord sequence (e.g. 'g t') into ordered BindingDescriptor[]
matchEvent: resolve mod from platform (Meta on mac, Ctrl on other) at match time
matchEvent: code-kind match via event.code + exact modifier-set equality
matchEvent: char-kind match via event.key produced char; Shift implied by glyph, not separately required
matchEvent: code-kind correctly matches macOS Option+letter (event.key='Dead' but event.code='KeyN')
matchEvent: code-kind correctly matches mod+letter on international layouts (Cyrillic/German physical S)
matchEvent: AltGr (ctrl+alt producing a character) does not false-match mod combos
useKeyboardShortcutRegistry: in-memory registry of actions keyed by id with add/remove
KeyboardShortcutsProvider: single capture-phase keydown listener on document; client-only ('use client')
useShortcutAction(def): register on mount, unregister on unmount; stable id; per-platform defaultBindings {mac,other} with single-array sugar expansion
useShortcutAction: enabled flag gates matching and preventDefault (preventDefault only when an enabled action handles the event)
useShortcutScope(scope): ref-counted push/pop of active scope stack
useShortcutScope: active scopes cleared on route change
Dispatch: skip handling when event.defaultPrevented is true
Dispatch: filter matched actions by active scopes
Dispatch: pick highest priority; tie → most-local active scope (top of stack)
Dispatch: residual tie reported as a conflict (dev/settings), never resolved by silent registration order
Editable-target suppression: input/textarea/select/contenteditable/role=textbox/role=combobox/editor roots
allowInEditable: true opt-in bypasses editable suppression for the action
Active-region API: register/unregister a roving-focus region; selection.* and single-letter page actions fire only when a region is active
KeyboardShortcutsProvider accepts an injected ShortcutStorage (prop/context); defaults to an in-memory adapter — the inversion seam that keeps packages/ui free of user-composition
Architecture boundary guard: keyboard-shortcuts engine must not import user-composition or feature packages; CI path delegates circular dependency check to known-cycles baseline
Sequence engine: chord buffer accumulates keys and resolves a matching parsed sequence
Sequence engine: configurable timeout (default ~1s) resets the buffer
Sequence engine: buffer resets on non-matching key, scope change, or route change
Sequence engine: suppressed in editable targets (no g-nav while typing)
Sequence engine: single-chord and sequence actions coexist without mutual interference
Radix integration: detect when a Radix modal owns Escape via ModalityContext/InsideDialogContext
Radix integration: dialog.cancel/panel.close route through Radix onEscapeKeyDown semantics; no competing global Escape listener while a Radix modal is open
Radix integration: nested modal Escape does not double-fire (respects existing stopPropagation/nesting fix)
Standard action ID catalog defined (global.*, page.*, selection.*, record.*, drawer.*, editor.*, assets.*, ai.*) with per-platform defaults
Per-platform default for editor.redo: mac=mod+shift+z, other=ctrl+y/ctrl+shift+z
Mount KeyboardShortcutsProvider in MspLayoutClient.tsx wrapping DefaultLayout and AlgaDeskMspShell
Provider not mounted on auth/client-portal screens
global.search action registered; remove window mod+k listener from SearchPalette.tsx; focuses global search as before
global.toggleChat action registered from DefaultLayout.tsx (mod+l), preserving aiAssistantAvailable gating and open/close-or-focus behavior
ai.quickAsk action registered from DefaultLayout.tsx (mod+ArrowUp), preserving aiAssistantAvailable gating and quick-ask/focus behavior
Remove the now-migrated window keydown listener block from DefaultLayout.tsx
global.openShortcuts action registered (default `?`) opening the help dialog
global.quickCreate action registered (default `c`, non-editable/active-region) opening QuickCreateDialog
assets.commandPalette action registered page-scoped with a distinct non-mod+k default
Remove window mod+k listener from AssetDashboardClient.tsx; asset palette opens via assets.commandPalette
mod+k resolves only to global.search app-wide (conflict removed)
panel.close action registered for drawers, Radix-integrated (Escape)
drawer.historyBack / drawer.historyForward actions registered
Migrate server/src/context/DrawerContext.tsx keydown handling to registered actions
Migrate packages/ui/src/context/DrawerContext.tsx keydown handling to registered actions (both contexts migrated together)
Drawer/panel scope pushed while a drawer is open, popped on close (ref-counted)
record.previous / record.next registered defaulting to [ and ] (code-kind)
Alt+ArrowLeft/Right offered only as opt-in alternate bindings for record.previous/next (not default)
Migrate TicketNavigation.tsx adjacent-record nav to record.previous/next; remove its window listener
Drawer/panel scope wins over ticket page scope while a drawer is open
editor scope pushed by invoice designer / workflow designer / rich-text editor roots (ref-counted)
Migrate invoice designer useDesignerShortcuts.ts (undo/redo/delete/escape/arrow-move) into editor-scoped registered actions
editor.undo/redo/save/deleteSelection registered with editor scope and high priority; per-platform redo (F071)
Workflow designer keyboard actions migrated/wrapped into editor scope
Rich-text (BlockNote) editor: editor scope + careful allowInEditable; BlockNote retains its own internal undo/redo (no double-handling)

MSP wrapper (server/user-composition layer) implements a useUserPreference-backed ShortcutStorage (key keyboard_shortcuts_v1; localStorage + debounced server sync) and INJECTS it into KeyboardShortcutsProvider via F043 — the @alga-psa/user-composition import lives here, NOT in packages/ui/keyboard-shortcuts
Persisted blob is delta-only in platform-neutral syntax (mod + logical tokens), with version and disabled[] fields
Effective binding resolution: userOverride[id] ?? platformDefault(id, platform)
Drop-equals-default guard: a user value equal to current platform default is removed from storage, not frozen
On load, validate overrides against current platform; surface non-blocking advisory for hostile/reserved combos; never silently rewrite
Versioned blob with migration function (v1 → vN)
disabled[] action list honored in dispatch (disabled actions never fire)
Unauthenticated path: localStorage-only via useUserPreference skipServerFetch/isUserLoggedIn
Add 'keyboard-shortcuts' tab to SettingsPage.tsx baseTabContent ({id,label,icon:KeyboardIcon,content} wrapped in Card/CardHeader/CardContent)
KeyboardShortcutsSettings.tsx component using shared Card/Table/Switch/Button/LoadingIndicator
Settings: list actions grouped by group with label, description, scope, default, effective binding (resolved for device)
Settings: inline key-capture rebind recording event.code for code-kind and event.key for char-kind (matches matcher)
Settings: clear a custom binding (revert to default)
Settings: disable an action via Switch (writes disabled[])
Settings: reset one action to default (ghost Button + RotateCcw icon)
Settings: reset all shortcuts to defaults behind a ConfirmationDialog (destructive intent)
Settings: inline platform-aware conflict detection before commit; replacing an existing binding requires explicit confirm
Settings: react-hot-toast success + handleError(error, t(...)) failure, consistent with other panels
Settings: LoadingIndicator while preferences load; preference-backed immediate debounced save (no explicit Save button)
Settings: every interactive element has an id; Button variants follow app conventions (default/outline/ghost/destructive)
Review settingsProductTabs.ts allowlist (no change expected for MSP-only); confirm tab visibility correct
ShortcutHelpDialog.tsx using shared Dialog; read-only; active shortcuts only
Help dialog: grouped by group/scope; disabled/unavailable actions hidden
Help dialog: custom (non-default) bindings visually flagged
Help dialog: bindings rendered resolved for current device (post-mount, no hydration mismatch)
Shared <Kbd>/ShortcutHint component renders platform glyphs (⌘/⌥/⇧/⌃ mac; Ctrl/Alt/Shift other) post-mount
Visible kbd hints added to curated key controls (global search field, primary action buttons, relevant menu items) and tooltips
aria-keyshortcuts mapping layer: convert effective binding to ARIA value format
aria-keyshortcuts applied to instrumented controls
Create EN namespace file server/public/locales/en/msp/keyboard-shortcuts.json (settings panel, help dialog, conflict/advisory messages chrome)
EN: action label keys for every registered action id (global.*, page.*, selection.*, record.*, drawer.*, editor.*, assets.*, ai.*)
EN: group name keys for every action group
Add 'keyboard-shortcuts' settings-tab label key to en/msp/settings.json
Action registration API takes labelKey/groupKey (i18n keys), not raw strings — enforced from Phase 1
Register msp/keyboard-shortcuts in ROUTE_NAMESPACES (packages/core/src/lib/i18n/config.ts) so it preloads for /msp
French (fr) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Spanish (es) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
German (de) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Dutch (nl) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Italian (it) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Polish (pl) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Portuguese (pt) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Regenerate pseudo-locales xx/yy (node scripts/generate-pseudo-locales.cjs)
validate-translations.cjs passes for the new namespace and settings-tab key across all locales
Platform glyph labels and aria-keyshortcuts text are localized/locale-safe; no hardcoded user-facing strings in engine/settings/help
Conflict/advisory messages (cross-device hostile-combo notices) internationalized
Regression-safe migration order enforced: each legacy handler removed only after its action is registered and verified
No SSR/hydration mismatch from platform/binding resolution (verified)
Component-local widget key handling (DatePicker, SearchableSelect, TagInput, comboboxes, Radix internals) unaffected by the system
